properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: There is a resting place in the center of His grace, I long to be in it so should you; So Lord guide my way I pray, in this Laodicean day, I only want to do what You want me to do.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Lord, with every step I take, With every move I make; Let Your Holy Spirit be my guide, Let me always heed Your voice, When I have to make a choice, I want Your perfect will for my life.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: There are times we think we're right, Think we have a green light; But we find ourselves in God's permissive will. But oh what glory and what beauty, To be in the line of duty, His perfect will I always want to fill.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Sub Chorus: I don't ever want to be caught Doing God a service without His will; Cause I know that He has a plan for me, I know that there is wonders to fulfill, I will.
